title: amendment.* status-change event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.7. Produced by epd2_initiative_service.events.amendment_state_payload, shared verbatim by four distinct event_type builders: build_amendment_submitted_event (amendment.submitted), build_amendment_published_event (amendment.published), build_amendment_accepted_event (amendment.accepted), build_amendment_rejected_event (amendment.rejected) - verified by reading events.py, all four call the shared private _build_amendment_event helper with the identical payload function and differ only in event_type.
